programs.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programs.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programs.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programs.desc: "Bloomberg Balance of Power" with host David Westin is a daily look at how politics is impacting global business decisions; top lawmakers, business executives and government leaders join to discuss doing business in today's volatile political climate.

programs.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programs.sub_title: Emma Grede: How She Built Good American and Helped Grow Skims
programs.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with Emma Grede, chief executive and co-founder of Good American and founding partner of Skims; they discuss leading with radical honesty, hiring flexible talent for different stages of growth and why failure, directness and self-belief are essential to scaling a business; she also opens up about stepping into the spotlight and shares her views on work from home, modern leadership and the role of artificial intelligence in retail.

programs.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programs.sub_title: The Podcast: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programs.desc: Shell Chief Executive Officer Wael Sawan joins Francine Lacqua to discuss the oil major's controversial strategy around the energy transition, and fostering a culture that shifts from "all-knowing" to "all-learning." He reflects on navigating volatility in the global energy system, emphasizing disciplined decision-making and focusing on what leaders can influence going forward.

programs.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programs.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programs.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programs.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy; from politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.
